changes.summary: Optional duration (default 5m) controlling how long read operations retry when a resource in state returns 404 before being removed from state; set to 0 or 0s for immediate fail-fast. Also configurable via GENESYSCLOUD_CUSTOM_RETRY_TIMEOUT.
No longer required; a digital ruleset can be managed without supplying rules in configuration.

On read, entries are normalized (grouped by expiration date, duplicates merged, phone lists sorted); for non-internal lists, entries are cleared in state because phone entries are only supported on internal (rds) lists.
Entry export retries when the API returns 404 while the export is still being prepared, in addition to existing 400 retries.
Changing entries deletes existing phone entries first; uploads proceed only for internal (rds) lists, with a clear error if entries are changed on other list types.
Categories containing function data action (case-insensitive, with underscores and hyphens treated as spaces) are recognized as function data actions and require function_config.
Now computed; the provider may populate this from the API when not explicitly set in configuration.
Now computed; the provider resolves and stores the pool ID for extension-based phone numbers.
State handling reduces perpetual plan diffs for extension-only numbers, API-derived numbers, and partially known set elements during apply.
Password changes retry once when Genesys Cloud temporarily blocks updates with a password cannot be changed until response.
Sent to the API only when timeout_settings.enable_idle_token_timeout is true; disabling idle token timeout no longer submits a timeout duration.
Deletion retries on HTTP 409 conflicts that can occur while extensions still reference the pool.
In-queue email flows use the correct flow type when resolving consumed-resource dependencies.
Exported flow dependency metadata is sorted consistently for deterministic depends_on output.
Resolves through the standard reference pipeline based on member_group_type (skill group, group, or team).
Resolves through the standard reference pipeline based on member_group_type (skill group, group, or team).
Resolves through the standard reference pipeline based on member_group_type (skill group, group, or team).
Resolves through the standard reference pipeline based on member_group_type (skill group, group, or team).
Pagination stops when the API returns an unchanged cursor, preventing list operations from looping indefinitely.
When no user matches the search criteria, the lookup fails immediately instead of retrying.
